content: A curiosity-driven autonomous agent can be built around a unified episodic-semantic graph as its core memory architecture, where the graph’s explicit edges between episodic experiences and abstract semantic knowledge dynamically guide the agent’s intrinsic curiosity toward under-connected knowledge regions. This integrated memory structure eliminates the need for separate episodic and semantic memory modules that current agents often silo, allowing curiosity-driven exploration to directly expand and refine the unified graph in a self-reinforcing loop.
